Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
53 
DSBLTY_OTHR_IND 
LABEL: 
Disability Indicator — Other Disability Not Listed — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary has another disability that is not included here; ever in the 
calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: DSBLTY_OTHR_IND 
LONG NAME: DSBLTY_OTHR_IND 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual
